entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary legume crop studied for yield and growth response.

entities.name: SAMNUT-24
entities.description: A specific variety of groundnut that showed the highest pod yield.

entities.name: POLYTENE MULCHING
entities.description: The application of polythene sheets to the soil surface to conserve moisture and suppress weeds.

entities.name: BROAD BED AND FURROWS
entities.description: A land preparation technique used to manage water and soil.

entities.name: SUDAN SAVANNA
entities.description: The ecological zone in Nigeria where the experiments were conducted.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the research took place.

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE MONTHS
entities.description: The specific climatic period during which the groundnut was grown.

entities.name: DRY SEASONS
entities.description: The seasonal period during which the experiments were conducted.

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water to the crop.

entities.name: SPLIT PLOT DESIGN
entities.description: The statistical experimental layout used for the study.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of groundnut pods produced per unit area.

entities.name: HAULM PRODUCTION
entities.description: The biomass of the vegetative parts of the groundnut plant.

entities.name: EMERGENCE
entities.description: The stage when the seedling first appears above the soil surface.

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The time taken for half of the crop population to reach the flowering stage.

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach the end of its growth cycle.

entities.name: 100 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The combined weight of 100 groundnut seeds.

entities.name: SPAD CHLOROPHYLL METER READING
entities.description: A measurement of the chlorophyll content in the leaves.

entities.name: LAI
entities.description: Leaf Area Index, the ratio of total upper leaf surface of a crop to the surface area of the land on which the crop grows.

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of the pod weight that is seed.
